commands.repair_reason: structured ClawSweeper needs-human verdict with repairable P-severity findings (sha=66869a4f5981030157697a00028d47ffc51a3b84)
commands.review_summary:
The PR adds `gemini-embedding-2` to the Google memory embedding provider, normalizes the preview id to the GA id, widens Embedding 2 dimension validation, and reuses the provider normalizer for multimodal capability checks.

PR surface: Source +6, Tests -1. Total +5 across 3 files.

Reproducibility: yes. for the PR defect: the PR head source and tests show `taskType` being sent with `gemini-embedding-2`, while the official Gemini docs say that field is unsupported for this model. I did not run a live Gemini credentialed request.
commands.review_followup: - [P1] Manual review is needed because the external PR has a concrete upstream-contract blocker plus missing contributor real behavior proof, and the preview-to-GA compatibility behavior needs maintainer-visible validation.
